hero_subtitle: SFTY helps CASPs consolidate multiple compliance providers into a unified operational layer that manages MiCA rules, Travel Rule workflows, case tracking, and audit evidence across jurisdictions.

trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when providers stay disconnected
problem_description: CASPs preparing for MiCA face fragmented workflows as multiple compliance providers operate in isolation. This separation creates gaps in regulatory rule updates, case evidence, and audit readiness, increasing manual workload and risking inconsistent compliance reviews across jurisdictions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs with MiCA-specific rules, cases and audit evidence into a unified operational workflow for seamless cross-jurisdiction compliance management.
workflow_title: From provider checks to MiCA decisions
workflow_description: SFTY orchestrates provider outputs through rule mapping, review workflows, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to support MiCA compliance operations.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for MiCA compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY supports CASP compliance teams by connecting MiCA-specific rules, provider outputs, workflows, cases and reports into a single operational layer for jurisdictional oversight and audit readiness.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate MiCA providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates and routes outputs from multiple KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers based on MiCA policies, enabling consistent case creation, review, escalation and evidence collection under local rules.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve MiCA audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, provider outputs, case files and regulatory rule changes to build audit-ready evidence packages for MiCA compliance reviews and supervisory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates flexibly with existing provider systems and compliance tools, connecting their outputs without requiring replacement and supporting layered MiCA workflows and governance.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT, or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a compliance control layer above KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers and does not replace the underlying services or technology.
final_title: Orchestrate MiCA compliance with provider workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects compliance providers into structured cases, rule updates and audit-ready evidence for MiCA preparedness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
